settings.title: Precision inflation: auto-stop technology
settings.description: Set your target PSI and the FLOW 1 stops itself. No guesswork, no over-inflation, no fumbling with a gauge at the trailhead. The auto-stop sensor reads pressure continuously and cuts the motor at exactly your preset point. Inflate, clip in, ride.

settings.title: 120 PSI brushless motor
settings.description: The FLOW 1 runs a brushless DC motor rated to 120 PSI — enough for road tyres, gravel, and hardtail MTB. A standard 29" mountain bike tyre inflates in under 90 seconds. Brushless means longer motor life, quieter operation, and less heat than conventional pump motors.

settings.title: USB-C rechargeable: 20+ inflations per charge
settings.description: One charge handles a full week of riding. The built-in battery recharges via USB-C in under two hours and delivers 20 or more full inflations before it needs power again. Charge it on Sunday night. Don't think about it until next Sunday.

settings.title: Universal valve compatibility
settings.description: The FLOW 1 works with both Schrader and Presta valves — the two standards used across road bikes, mountain bikes, gravel bikes, and e-bikes. Switch between valve types in seconds. No adaptor hunting, no separate purchase.
